reference: Dear patient, it seems you have a back sprain, which needs proper rest. Avoid running for a week and take painkillers like diclofenac twice a day. Then start gradually increasing running so that your muscles get adjusted to the strain.
text: Dear patient, seems you have a back strain, which needs proper rest. Avoid running for a week and take painkillers like the first nap twice a day. Then start gradually increasing running so that your muscles get adjusted to strain.
